description: The Milwaukee crime family was an Italian American Mafia crime family based in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, founded around 1918 by Vito Guardalabene. At its peak, it had over 50 made members and maintained links to other Midwestern Mafia families. The family was heavily involved in skimming revenue from Las Vegas casinos under boss Frank Balistrieri. After Balistrieri's death in 1993, the Chicago Outfit absorbed the family, and it ceased to exist as an independent organization by 2024.
